reflection:
you wrote that 7 hours of sleep with 5 wake-ups still felt like a miracle, and you noticed your brain felt rested even when your body wanted more bed. that self-observation is doing real work for you. the london pattern is holding, HRV climbed from 24 to 31 to 52 across three nights, which is your body saying thank you for the slower rhythm and the third day of telfast 120.

the thing that stood out, you wrote 'i am avoiding deep conversations with cosita' right next to 'i want sex' in the same morning entry. that gap is worth seeing today. nothing to fix before salaries and renzo, but it's not nothing either.

the speech keeps showing up. in could-be-better, in the slash dream, in the worry dump. it is not going to write itself by being thought about. and yesterday you put away a cheesy truffle pasta plus burrata plus focaccia with less bloating than you predicted, which means daosin is earning its place in the stack and your gut tolerated more than your story about your gut allows for.

for today, salaries plus parr plus renzo will eat the day if you let them. before any of that, give the speech 30 protected minutes. open the doc, write three rough sentences, close it. you don't need a great draft, you need a draft. cosita can wait until you've moved that one piece forward.
opener: 7h sleep felt like a miracle and HRV climbed 24 to 52. now write the speech
focus_for_today: 30 protected minutes on the speech before salaries, parr, renzo eat the day
